sentences.text: On no account, cried little Hans, and he jumped out of bed, dressed himself, and went to the barn.
He worked there all day long until sunset, and at sunset, the Miller came to see how he was doing.
'Have you fixed the hole in the roof yet, little Hans?' cried the Miller in a cheerful voice.
'It is completely fixed,' answered little Hans as he came down the ladder.
